query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) as total_customers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE totalOrders > 0) as cust_with_orders,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE lastPurchaseDate IS NOT NULL) as cust_with_purchase_date,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) as total_orders,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customerId IS NOT NULL) as orders_linked,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customerId) FROM orders WHERE customerId IS NOT NULL) as unique_cust_in_orders,
  (SELECT MIN(orderDate) FROM orders) as earliest_order,
  (SELECT MAX(orderDate) FROM orders) as latest_order;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user VDyW8BBNx15QJxW.root --database DN8ihETPKNPmGxAqBwYu7X --execute

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE lastPurchaseDate IS NOT NULL) as cust_with_purchase_date,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders) as total_orders,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customerId IS NOT NULL) as orders_linked,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customerId) FROM orders WHERE customerId IS NOT NULL) as unique_cust_in_orders,
  (SELECT MIN(orderDate) FROM orders) as earliest_order,
